title: Idea Stress Test
prompt: Stress-test launching Hephaestus before command execution. Be brutally honest but useful: is the decision-quality OS wedge strong enough, or is it too abstract?

memory_context.content: Hephaestus must feel like a coherent next-generation agent OS, not a collection of unrelated features.
memory_context.summary: Hephaestus needs coherent agent OS positioning.

strategic_memory_context.content: Build Hephaestus toward a 20k-star open-source project by making decision quality the wedge.
